history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, medium shot of a Black man with dreadlocks, wearing glasses, appears to be asleep or unconscious in the passenger seat of a car. His head is tilted back against the headrest, and his mouth is open with his tongue slightly sticking out. He has a goatee and is wearing hoop earrings. The lighting is natural, coming from the side, casting soft shadows on his face. The background is blurred, showing the interior of a car, with a hint of the car door and window. The overall mood is one of exhaustion or deep slumber. The color palette is muted, with tones of skin, dark hair, and the neutral colors of the car interior. The style is realistic, capturing a candid moment.
